==================================== ERRORS ==================================== __________ ERROR collecting tests/tui/app/test_run_command_palette.py __________ ImportError while importing test module '/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/tui/app/test_run_command_palette.py'. session.assistant:
pytest failed: ImportError during test collection
**Issue:** The test file `tests/tui/app/test_run_command_palette.py` is trying to import `PlanFilters` from `erk.tui.data.types`, but this class doesn't exist in that module.
**Error Details:** - File: `tests/tui/app/test_run_command_palette.py` (line 8) - Missing import: `PlanFilters` from `erk.tui.data.types` - This prevents the test module from even being imported, causing a collection error
This appears to be a refactoring issue where `PlanFilters` has been renamed or moved, but the test file hasn't been updated to use the new name/location.
